Yahoo was still big.

I told him, yes, are you and I?
you and you're another SEO guy, right?

I have automation.

But then, at some point, Google was stopped those backlinks effect on my rankings.
And at some point, Google was advanced enough.
to, after they hired Matt Katz, they approached everyone and told them, report to me about all your backlinks or you're out.

But then I watched and learned what you're doing and I'm cool.
It's not the same.
Yeah, I'm with you.

How do you figure out what questions people have?

and how do you become the best answer to people's questions, but try to do it in a programmatic way so that you can just become the best answer to every question they have programmatically and try to find ways to lead to your product without leading with your product.
And so that approach, I think, is just like taking the human approach, whereas SEO is kind of like you take a keyword and you just chase that keyword.
don't get me wrong, need to do some of that too.
But if you can take an approach where it's humanizing it a bit more, understanding the intent behind it, understand what your company does.
And then in stealing that and understanding the keyword, understanding what already ranks and trying to adapt it to you, to your company, then you're kind of taking a little bit of both, right?
But you're able to do it times, you know, 10,000.
And then the only bottleneck is just still having an expert in the loop reviewing that process and kind of going through it.
You know, and so we're trying to like merge the two, which is like...

building automation in a way that just gathers contacts and personalizes a lot of things, take the insight and in like the keywords and in the right strategy, but then not removing humans from the occasion, but inserting them and where they can add the best judgment and the best value, right, as opposed to just like staring at a blank page and going, okay, I guess I got to write about, you know, conversion optimization.
Okay, what am I going to write, how to optimize website, right, like and you just like, it's just not a very efficient way to do it, you know, and so yeah.
So I believe that Google algorithm is smart enough today to understand if the user found an answer on the web page that was a that he clicked on.
Now, how they do it, there is only one good way to do that.
And that's measuring the time on site.
And they had this information, right?
They just know that because everybody is using Google Analytics.

They have so many ways to do that.
I think this is the best thing to do.

I want to use your services.
I want to enjoy all the benefits and give me a budget for this for three months.
You discussed the details with him.
just need to have him starting.

I'll give you a little context.

you know, and I think part of it was like, well, but let's do a three month trial first and then we'll engage and let's discount it and make this the cheapest engagement we have.

And so like, I got a little bit like mixed signals as far as like, okay, like, what's the goal we want to have here?
And you know, kind of how do we set it up in the way?
if that's like mutually beneficial, transparent at the same time, you know?
Okay, so what Gil told me is that he wants to work with you because he's fully convinced and he tells you and he knows that it will help us.

that are that are using our services for managing their campaigns.
some of them inquired about us doing SEO for them.

yes, we are looking for
long-term relationship.

I'm Pauline I hope that yeah so they don't so yeah they're looking long-term cooperation not three months and goodbye.
We just want to see that it's for us that's for me.

The way we kind of approach the strategy, right, like I can show you, I think I might have shown it yesterday, like there's on one angle we do competitive research and take every single mindshare competitor that's going after the same audience as you, and then we cluster them into like potential assignments.

so you can see like.

let's say first, four weeks, it's like getting the publishing process going and getting the quality right.

like, that's where we kind of see the results, like, well, end of 90 days, what I would expect is like, hey, we publish X number of pieces of content, and we're seeing an upward trend in impressions, and an upward trend in clicks, you know.

right?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and finalize a 3-month SEO engagement between Metadata and fwd.digital, addressing expectations, goals, and terms.](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement on a 3-month trial with potential for 12-month commitment, starting November 4th](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Expectations set for gradual SEO improvements, with significant results expected after 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [fwd.digital to send updated SLW (Statement of Work) with clear 90-day out clause](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Anthony will be main point of contact, with Yaron highly involved](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

## Topics

### Background and SEO Approach

  - [Yaron shared past experience with questionable SEO tactics](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Marcel explained fwd.digital's human-centric, programmatic approach:](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [Focus on understanding audience and becoming best answer to questions](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Merge automation with human expertise for efficient, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Aim to create 10,000+ pieces of content with expert review](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### Engagement Terms and Expectations

  - [Initial proposal: 3-month trial at discounted rate](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [fwd.digital typically seeks 12-month commitments due to high demand](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Agreed on 3-month trial with option to continue for 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Expectations for 90-day period:](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [Weeks 1-4: Set up publishing process, improve quality](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
      - [Weeks 5-8: Ramp up process, see initial impressions](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Weeks 9-12: Start seeing clicks, upward trend in traffic](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### SEO Strategy and Process

  - [Competitive research to identify keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Use of AI and LLMs to analyze top-ranking content and intent](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Cluster keywords into assignments with relevance scores](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Publish content against identified opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Expect gradual improvement in indexing speed and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Start date: November 4th](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [fwd.digital to send updated SLW with 90-day out clause](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Create shared Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Schedule kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

### Additional Context

  - [Marcel is an investor in Metadata ($125,000 investment)](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Brief discussion on Yaron's residence in Thailand and Marcel's past visit](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send updated SLW to Yaron](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [fwd.digital to create shared Slack channel for project communication](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Schedule kickoff meeting for November 4th](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Anthony to be set up as main point of contact for the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Yaron to review and sign updated SLW upon receipt](https://fathom.video/share/rGpb6MmRHQjyyQcZD4-fdVcsT1uvyuXL?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

action_items.description: Create & send 90-day expectations/goals doc to Yaron
Rework SLW - add 90-day out clause, auto 12-mo commit. Send to Yaron.
Create shared Slack channel for Metadata project, add Yaron & Anthony
